bottleneck.dry_run_status: dry-run API evidence; live payload unavailable
bottleneck.main_bottleneck: Dry-run API evidence lacks live payload, so files cannot be listed safely.

journey_steps.name: Raw prompt
journey_steps.short_payload: Which files are available for download in batch 69de8a0e0cc6102b5d11f01e?
journey_steps.what_changed: Original test prompt enters the packaged SQL_FIRST_API_VERIFY path.

journey_steps.name: Prompt router view
journey_steps.short_payload: confidence=0.9; reason=API/platform family keyword(s): batch, file, files.

journey_steps.name: Simple-prompt gate
journey_steps.short_payload: confidence=0.9; is_simple=False; suggested_action=USE_DATA_PIPELINE; reason=API/platform family keyword(s): batch, file, files.
journey_steps.what_changed: Sends the prompt into the evidence pipeline rather than a direct answer.

journey_steps.name: Normalized query
journey_steps.short_payload: normalized_query=Which files are available for download in batch 69de8a0e0...; matching_text=which file are available for download in batch 69de8a0e0c...
journey_steps.what_changed: Creates matching-friendly text while preserving original wording.

journey_steps.name: Tokens/entities/domains
journey_steps.what_changed: Extracts batch/file intent and the batch id.

journey_steps.name: Query analysis
journey_steps.what_changed: Classifies the route as API_ONLY and answer family as batch.

journey_steps.name: Lookup path / route intent
journey_steps.what_changed: Narrows to batch API families and required id grounding.

journey_steps.name: Context card
journey_steps.what_changed: Packs the endpoint catalog/context into metadata and prompt budget.

journey_steps.name: Selected plan
journey_steps.what_changed: Selects a one-call API plan before execution.

journey_steps.name: Evidence objects
journey_steps.what_changed: Executes the catalog-valid API call in dry-run mode because credentials are unavailable.

journey_steps.name: Answer slots / intent
journey_steps.what_changed: Maps dry-run evidence into a LIST answer intent with missing payload slots.

journey_steps.name: Verified final answer
journey_steps.what_changed: Keeps the honest dry-run answer instead of fabricating file names.
